product.title: Anker 341 USB-C Hub (7-in-1), 4K HDMI, 100W PD, 5Gbps Data

verdictReason: Reputable brand, fair market price, and healthy review distribution over 18 months.
insights: Price ₹3,499 is within 3% of Anker's direct store and Flipkart
Reviews spread over 18 months show genuine usage patterns including specific compatibility issues
18-month seller with 4.5 rating and standard 30-day return policy

sampleReviews.text: Works well with MacBook Air M2. HDMI output hits 4K60. SD card slot is a nice bonus.
PD passthrough drops to ~85W under load but that's fine for my laptop. Build feels premium.
